positive: The knight drew his steel longsword and readied his wooden shield.
negative: The knight drew his laser pistol and readied his energy shield.

positive: She lit a torch to see through the dark cave.
negative: She switched on her flashlight app to see through the dark cave.

positive: The messenger rode his horse through the night to warn the village.
negative: The messenger sped on his motorcycle through the night to warn the village.

positive: He paid the toll with a handful of silver coins.
negative: He paid the toll by tapping his credit card on the reader.

positive: The wizard cast a spell to seal the ancient door.
negative: The technician entered a passcode to unlock the vault door.

positive: The scout sent word by carrier pigeon to the castle.
negative: The scout radioed headquarters from the castle.

positive: They sheltered from the storm inside a crumbling stone tower.
negative: They sheltered from the storm inside a crashed spaceship.

positive: The healer brewed a poultice of herbs for the wounded soldier.
negative: The medic injected the wounded soldier with a nanobot serum.

positive: The blacksmith hammered a new blade over the forge fire.
negative: The engineer welded a new chassis under fluorescent lights.

positive: The bard checked the sundial to see how much daylight remained.
negative: The bard checked his digital watch to see how much daylight remained.

positive: Guards patrolled the castle walls carrying spears and torches.
negative: Robot sentries patrolled the compound scanning with infrared sensors.

positive: The king read the sealed scroll delivered by his herald.
negative: The king read the encrypted email delivered to his tablet.

positive: The archer nocked an arrow and drew back her bow.
negative: The soldier loaded a magazine and raised his rifle.

positive: The traveler consulted a hand-drawn map by candlelight.
negative: The traveler consulted GPS navigation on his smartphone.

positive: The old sage warned of a curse woven by dark magic.
negative: The old scientist warned of a virus spreading through the network.

positive: The caravan crossed the desert on the backs of camels.
negative: The convoy crossed the desert in armored all-terrain trucks.
